title: ruellia neolongifolius
intro: Ruellia neolongifolius is a perennial plant species in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the Long-Leaf Ruellia or Chinese Ruellia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ruellia neolongifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ruellia neolongifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine.
